_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about financial planning skills, including how to create a budget and set personal financial goals.

_source.w: We are learning about financial planning skills, including how to create a budget and set personal financial goals.
y: Budgeting is one of the most practical life skills we can develop — it puts us in control of our money.
Financial planning helps us achieve our goals, whether saving for something specific or building long-term security.
Starting to plan our finances now builds habits that will benefit us for decades.
eg: Creating a personal budget that tracks income and expenses over a month.
Setting a savings goal and calculating how long it will take to reach it.
Investigating the difference between saving and investing and when each is appropriate.
Discussing the concept of 'paying yourself first' — prioritising savings before spending.
Analysing a case study of two people with the same income but different financial outcomes due to planning.
Using a budgeting app or spreadsheet to track spending and identify areas for improvement.
